title: stylidium ensatum
intro: Stylidium ensatum, also known as the spiky triggerplant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Stylidiaceae, native to Western Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stylidium ensatum include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Stylidium ensatum can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea that can be used to treat various health conditions.
